app.name: SubExtract
app.description: Extract subtitles from 50+ platforms including YouTube and Bilibili

home.title: Online Video Subtitle Downloader
home.subtitle: Extract multilingual subtitles from YouTube, Bilibili, Viki and 50+ video platforms
home.step1_desc: Copy the video link you want to download subtitles from
home.step2_desc: We automatically detect the video and extract available subtitles
home.step3_desc: Select from SRT, VTT, TXT, ASS, or HTML formats
home.step4_desc: Download your subtitle file with one click

subtitle.no_subtitles: No subtitles detected for this video
subtitle.no_voice: No voice audio detected in this video

errors.invalid_url: The requested video does not exist. Please check the URL
errors.not_supported: This platform is not yet supported. Try another video link
errors.network_error: Network error. Please try again later
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment
errors.download_failed: Subtitle download failed. Try another format
